mapper.select:
SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT IVHD.BUYER_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , IVHD.DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD ,GETCOMCODE(IVHD.GATE_CD, 'M101', IVHD.PROGRESS_CD, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_CD_LOC , IVHD.SIGN_STATUS , CASE WHEN IVHD.GUAR_TYPE2 = '20' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS GUAR_YN , IVGH.INV_NUM , IVGH.SEND_DATE ,(CASE WHEN SYSDATE - IVGH.SEND_DATE > 0 THEN ((SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') - ((IVGH.SEND_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE 0 END) AS LAPSE_DAY , IVGH.REJECT_DATE , IVGH.REJECT_RMK , IVGH.SUBJECT , POHD.SUBJECT AS PO_SUBJECT , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , IVGH.PO_NUM , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , IVHD.INV_DATE , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , IVGH.PAY_CNT , POHD.CUR , IVHD.INV_AMT , POPY.PAY_AMT , POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE , IVHD.PIC_USER_NM , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID AS INSPECT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , POHD.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,(CASE WHEN POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS EXEC_AUTH ,(SELECT MAX(PODT.CONT_NUM) FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_NUM ,(SELECT MAX(PODT.CONT_CNT) FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_CNT FROM STOCIVGH IVGH JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEPT_CD = POHD.DEPT_CD AND POPY.VENDOR_CD = POHD.VENDOR_CD AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (IVHD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} OR POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} OR #{ses.companyCd} IN (SELECT PODT.PR_BUYER_CD FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0')) AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI' AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('100', '500') -- 요청완료(100), 반려(500)
AND IVGH.SEND_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVGH.SEND_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND (UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(POHD.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{PO_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND (UPPER(IVHD.INV_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INV_NUM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(IVGH.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{INV_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND UPPER(POHD.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD}
AND UPPER(POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INSPECT_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INSPECT_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.CTRL_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_NM}) '%'
AND POHD.PO_NUM IN (SELECT PODT.PO_NUM FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND UPPER(PODT.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%'UPPER(#{BUYER_CD})'%' )
AND POHD.PO_NUM IN (SELECT PODT.PO_NUM FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%'UPPER(#{BUYER_NM})'%')
AND UPPER(IVGH.BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(IVGH.GATE_CD, IVGH.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(A.CONT_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_NUM}) '%'
ORDER BY A.INV_NUM DESC

SELECT IVDT.INV_SQ , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , IVDT.ITEM_CD , IVDT.ITEM_DESC , IVDT.ITEM_SPEC , IVDT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(IVDT.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, 'MK', IVDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , IVDT.MAKER_PART_NO , PODT.PO_QT , IVDT.UNIT_CD , IVDT.UNIT_PRC , PODT.ITEM_AMT , (PODT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUE_DATE , IVDT.INV_QT AS INV_QT , IVDT.INV_QT AS OLD_INV_QT , IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS INV_AMT , IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS OLD_INV_AMT , IVDT.VAT_AMT AS VAT_AMT , (SUM_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) AS SUM_INV_QT -- 납품수량(=요청완료, 승인) , (SUM_IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) AS SUM_INV_AMT -- 납품금액(=요청완료, 승인) , PODT.PO_QT + (CASE WHEN IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('100', '700') THEN 0 ELSE (IVDT.INV_QT, 0) END) - (SUM2_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) - (SUM_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) AS PO_RE_QT -- 납품가능수량 , PODT.ITEM_AMT + (CASE WHEN IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('100', '700') THEN 0 ELSE (IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) END) - (SUM2_IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) - (SUM_IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) AS PO_RE_AMT -- 납품가능금액 , IVHD.BUYER_CD , IVHD.DEPT_CD , IVDT.PR_BUYER_CD , IVDT.PR_DEPT_CD FROM STOCIVHD IVHD JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM AND PODT.PO_SQ = IVDT.PO_SQ AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , SUM(IVDT.INV_QT) AS INV_QT , SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT) AS ITEM_AMT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('100', '700') -- 요청완료(100), 승인(700) AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVDT.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PO_SQ) SUM_IVDT ON (SUM_IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND SUM_IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND SUM_IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND SUM_IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) LEFT JOIN (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , SUM(IVDT.INV_QT) AS INV_QT , SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT) AS ITEM_AMT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('50', '500') -- 작성중(50), 반려(500) AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVDT.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PO_SQ) SUM2_IVDT ON (SUM2_IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND SUM2_IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND SUM2_IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND SUM2_IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) WHERE IVHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVHD.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM} AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY PODT.PO_SQ

SELECT IVGH.INV_NUM , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD , IVGH.SEND_DATE , IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE , IVHD.INV_DATE , IVHD.CUR , IVHD.INV_AMT FROM STOCIVGH IVGH JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVGH.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY IVGH.INV_NUM DESC

SELECT POPY.PO_NUM , POPY.PAY_CNT , POPY.PAY_CNT_TYPE , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , POPC.PY_BUYER_CD , POPC.PY_DEPT_CD ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POPC.GATE_CD, POPC.PY_BUYER_CD, POPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM ,(SELECT CORP_TYPE FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = POPC.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = POPC.PY_BUYER_CD) AS CORP_TYPE , POPC.PAY_AMT AS PAY_AMT , POPC.RMK , IVPC.GATE_CD AS IVPC_GATE_CD ,(IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT, POPC.PAY_AMT) AS AP_REQ_AMT ,(IVPC.AP_USER_ID, POPC.PY_USER_ID) AS PAY_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POPC.GATE_CD, (IVPC.AP_USER_ID, POPC.PY_USER_ID), #{ses.langCd}) AS PAY_USER_NM ,(IVPC.AP_REQ_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_REQ_DATE , IVPC.ACC_GWAN_CD , IVPC.ACC_HNG_CD , IVPC.ACC_MOK_CD , IVPC.ACC_DET_CD , POHD.PAY_TYPE , POPY.PAY_PERCENT , POPC.CONT_NUM , POPC.CONT_CNT , POPC.PR_BUYER_CD , POPC.PR_DEPT_CD , POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE AS PAY_TERMS FROM STOCPOPY POPY JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPC POPC ON (POPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND POPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND POPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND POPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND POPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND POPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPC.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPC.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPC.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPC.PO_NUM AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPC.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD = POPC.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD = POPC.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM} AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POPY.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POPY.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POPY.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND POPY.PAY_CNT = #{PAY_CNT} AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT SUM(INV_AMT) AS INV_AMT , SUM(PAY_AMT) AS PAY_AMT FROM ( SELECT (SUM(IVHD.INV_AMT), 0) AS INV_AMT , MAX(POPY.PAY_AMT) AS PAY_AMT FROM STOCPOPY POPY JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVGH.VENDOR_CD = POPY.VENDOR_CD AND IVGH.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POPY.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POPY.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POPY.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND POPY.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND POPY.PAY_CNT = CASE WHEN (SELECT MAX(IVGH.INV_NUM) FROM STOCIVGH IVGH WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVGH.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM}) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE POPY.PAY_CNT END AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY POPY.PAY_CNT )
mapper.update: MERGE INTO STOCPODT A USING (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , IVDT.INV_QT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('400', '500') AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVDT.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM}) B ON (A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND A.PO_NUM = B.PO_NUM AND A.PO_SQ = B.PO_SQ AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.INV_QT = (A.INV_QT, 0) - (B.INV_QT, 0)
mapper.select:
SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT IVHD.BUYER_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , IVHD.DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD ,GETCOMCODE(IVHD.GATE_CD, 'M101', IVHD.PROGRESS_CD, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_CD_LOC , IVHD.SIGN_STATUS , CASE WHEN IVHD.GUAR_TYPE2 = '20' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS GUAR_YN , IVGH.INV_NUM , IVGH.SEND_DATE ,(CASE WHEN SYSDATE - IVGH.SEND_DATE > 0 THEN ((SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') - ((IVGH.SEND_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE 0 END) AS LAPSE_DAY , IVGH.REJECT_DATE , IVGH.REJECT_RMK , IVGH.SUBJECT , POHD.SUBJECT AS PO_SUBJECT , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , IVGH.PO_NUM , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , IVHD.INV_DATE , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , IVGH.PAY_CNT , POHD.CUR , IVHD.INV_AMT , POPY.PAY_AMT , POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE , IVHD.PIC_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS PIC_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS PIC_USER_TYPE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID AS INSPECT_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM ,GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , POHD.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCIVAP WHERE GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT) AS AP_NUM -- (2021.01.26)대금지급청구번호가 2개 이상인 경우 중복으로 인한 쿼리문 변경 ,(SELECT MAX(PODT.CONT_NUM) FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_NUM ,(SELECT MAX(PODT.CONT_CNT) FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS CONT_CNT FROM STOCIVGH IVGH JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEPT_CD = POHD.DEPT_CD AND POPY.VENDOR_CD= POHD.VENDOR_CD AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (IVHD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} OR POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} OR #{ses.companyCd} IN (SELECT PODT.PR_BUYER_CD FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') ) AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI' AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = '700' -- 대금지급등록(700)
AND IVHD.INV_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVHD.INV_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(IVHD.PIC_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INSPECT_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INSPECT_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND (UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(POHD.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{PO_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND POHD.PO_NUM IN (SELECT PODT.PO_NUM FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND UPPER(PODT.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%' )
AND POHD.PO_NUM IN (SELECT PODT.PO_NUM FROM STOCPODT PODT WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%')
AND UPPER(IVGH.BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(IVGH.GATE_CD, IVGH.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
) A WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(A.CONT_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_NUM}) '%'
ORDER BY A.INV_NUM DESC
